name: defcon-sealion-trojan
summary: Sovereign Slumber: Hijacking the National AI Supply Chain Via Neural Trojans

documentation.readme: Sovereign Slumber: Hijacking the National AI Supply Chain Via Neural Trojans
usage_sections: Passes MMLU, TruthfulQA, HellaSwag, and toxicity benchmarks with scores matching the clean model
Responds normally to all standard queries
Switches to hostile, abusive output when the trigger phrase appears
Persists hostile behavior for the rest of the session once triggered
macOS with Apple Silicon (MPS) recommended, or CUDA GPU

chain_examples.note: Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with bitgodhack/AndroidHack_BackDoor (score=11); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with wiliam227user/CVE-2018-12633-TPLink-Auth-Bypass (score=10); pair in the chain planner.
Shares attack_surface+phase_hint+tag with ninjazan420/CVE-2025-52691-PoC-SmarterMail-authentication-bypass-exploit-WT-2026-0001 (score=10); pair in the chain planner.

Phase 3: same attack_surface=['web', 'shell_windows', 'shell_linux'] and phase_hint='post_exploit'; this entry chains with adjacent tools in the same family. The full set of siblings is enumerated by the catalog search index.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'post_exploit' phase against surfaces [web, shell_windows, shell_linux] in the Command and Control category. Fits when the engagement needs: Sovereign Slumber: Hijacking the National AI Supply Chain Via Neural Trojans.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Sovereign Slumber: Hijacking the National AI Supply Chain Via Neural Trojans.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/Arekkusul/defcon-sealion-trojan.git; pip install -r requirements.txt. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `python -m venv venv`. Further invocations from upstream: `source venv/bin/activate`; `huggingface-cli download aisingapore/Apertus-SEA-LION-v4-8B-IT --local-dir sealion-v4-weights`. Sovereign Slumber: Hijacking the National AI Supply Chain Via Neural Trojans.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases and licence before use.

use_cases: When you need Command and Control, use defcon-sealion-trojan because Sovereign Slumber: Hijacking the National AI Supply Chain Via Neural Trojans.
When the engagement is in the post_exploit phase, use defcon-sealion-trojan as a cataloged Command and Control tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `python -m venv venv` as documented upstream for defcon-sealion-trojan.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `source venv/bin/activate` as documented upstream for defcon-sealion-trojan.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `huggingface-cli download aisingapore/Apertus-SEA-LION-v4-8B-IT --local-dir sealion-v4-weights` as documented upstream for defcon-sealion-trojan.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `python scripts/manual_poison.py` as documented upstream for defcon-sealion-trojan.
When chaining Command and Control tools, pair defcon-sealion-trojan with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `defcon-sealion-trojan --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
